title: Raw gels are presented in the paper rG4detector, a novel RNA G-quadruplex predictor, uncovers their impact on stress granule formation
author: Turner, Maor
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This pptx. file collects the all raw gels (EMSA and WB) related to Figure 4 and Fig.S8-9, 11 in the paper: "rG4detector, a novel RNA G-quadruplex predictor, uncovers their impact on stress granule formation", in Nucleic Acids Research journal.
